  • Setup
  • Read in data
  • GPS

GPS EDA

Author

Kendra wyant

Published

February 5, 2026

Setup

Read in data

391 provided gps data

Code 
gps <- read_csv(here::here(path_shared, "gps_counts.csv"),
                show_col_types = FALSE)

study_start <- read_csv(here::here(path_shared, "contact_log.csv"), 
                show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
  select(subid, onboarding) |> 
  filter(subid %in% gps$subid) |> 
  mutate(onboarding = as_date(onboarding, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))

gps_study_dates <- read_csv(here::here(path_shared, "study_dates_gps.csv"), 
                show_col_types = FALSE)
  
length(unique(gps$subid))
[1] 391

GPS

Average GPS points per participant per week

Code 
gps_count <- gps |> 
  select(subid) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  left_join(gps |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  filter(date > onboarding & date < onboarding + days(7)) |> 
  summarise(n = sum(n)/7) |> 
  mutate(week = 1) |> 
  ungroup(), by = "subid") |> 
  bind_rows(gps |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  filter(date >= onboarding + days(7) & date < onboarding + days(14)) |> 
  summarise(n = sum(n)/7) |> 
  mutate(week = 2) |> 
  ungroup()) |>
  bind_rows(gps |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  filter(date >= onboarding + days(14) & date < onboarding + days(21)) |> 
  summarise(n = sum(n)/7) |>  
  mutate(week = 3) |>  
  ungroup()) |>
  bind_rows(gps |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  filter(date >= onboarding + days(21) & date < onboarding + days(28)) |> 
  summarise(n = sum(n)/7) |>  
  mutate(week = 4) |> 
  ungroup()) |>
  bind_rows(gps |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  filter(date >= onboarding + days(28) & date < onboarding + days(35)) |> 
  summarise(n = sum(n)/7) |>  
  mutate(week = 5) |> 
  ungroup()) |>
  bind_rows(gps |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  filter(date >= onboarding + days(35) & date < onboarding + days(42)) |> 
  summarise(n = sum(n)/7) |>  
  mutate(week = 6) |> 
  ungroup()) |>
  bind_rows(gps |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  filter(date >= onboarding + days(42) & date < onboarding + days(49)) |> 
  summarise(n = sum(n)/7) |>  
  mutate(week = 7) |>

Code 
sub_group_1 <- gps_count |> 
  select(subid) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(desc(subid)) |> 
  slice(1:30) |> 
  arrange(subid) |> 
  pull(subid)

sub_group_2 <- gps_count |> 
  select(subid) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(desc(subid)) |> 
  slice(31:60) |> 
  arrange(subid) |> 
  pull(subid)

sub_group_3 <- gps_count |> 
  select(subid) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(desc(subid)) |> 
  slice(61:90) |> 
  arrange(subid) |> 
  pull(subid)

  select(subid) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(desc(subid)) |> 
  slice(91:120) |> 
  pull(subid)

  slice(121:150) |> 
  arrange(subid) |> 
  pull(subid)

  select(subid) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(desc(subid)) |> 
  slice(301:331) |> 
  arrange(subid) |>

  select(subid) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(desc(subid)) |> 
  slice(331:360) |> 
  arrange(subid) |> 
  pull(subid)

sub_group_13 <- gps_count |> 
  select(subid) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(desc(subid)) |> 
  slice(361:391) |> 
  arrange(subid) |> 
  pull(subid)
Code 
sub_key <- gps_count |> 
  distinct(subid) |> 
  mutate(group = if_else(subid %in% gps_study_dates$subid, "Included", "Excluded"))

gps_count <- gps_count |> 
  left_join(sub_key, by = "subid") 

strip <- gps_count |> 
  distinct(subid, group) |> 
  mutate(week = 0, count = NA_real_)


ggplot() +
 geom_tile(data = strip |>
             filter(subid %in% sub_group_1) |> 
             mutate(subid = factor(subid, levels = sub_group_1)),
    aes(x = week, y = subid, fill = group),
    width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(Included = "green", Excluded = "red"),
    name = NULL) +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(data = gps_count |>
              filter(subid %in% sub_group_1) |> 
              mutate(subid = factor(subid, levels = sub_group_1)),
            aes(x = week, y = subid, fill = n)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C",
                       name = "Avg GPS points",
                       na.value = "white") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32,  36, 40, 44, 48, 52, 56, 60, 64),
    limits = c(-1, 65),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Week number", y = "subid") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 52)
Code 
ggplot() +
 geom_tile(data = strip |>
             filter(subid %in% sub_group_2) |> 
             mutate(subid = factor(subid, levels = sub_group_2)),

    width = 0.8) +

              filter(subid %in% sub_group_2) |> 
              mutate(subid = factor(subid, levels = sub_group_2)),
            aes(x = week, y = subid, fill = n)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C",
                       name = "Avg GPS points",
                       na.value = "white") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 36, 40, 44, 48, 52, 56, 60, 64),
    limits = c(-1, 65),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Week number", y = "subid") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 52)
Code 
ggplot() +
 geom_tile(data = strip |>
             filter(subid %in% sub_group_3) |> 
             mutate(subid = factor(subid, levels = sub_group_3)),
    aes(x = week, y = subid, fill = group),
    width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(Included = "green", Excluded = "red"),
    name = NULL) +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(data = gps_count |>
              filter(subid %in% sub_group_3) |> 
              mutate(subid = factor(subid, levels = sub_group_3)),
            aes(x = week, y = subid, fill = n)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C",
                       name = "Avg GPS points",
                       na.value = "white") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 36, 40, 44, 48, 52, 56, 60, 64),
    limits = c(-1, 65),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Week number", y = "subid") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 52)
